---
title: "On The Day Itinerary"
about:
   image: DSC03105.JPEG
   image-width: 100%
   image-shape: rounded
   template: trestles
fig-cap-location: bottom
---


---

### 02:30PM - Arrive at 23 Kererū Street

---

### 04:00PM Ceremony

---

### After ceremony Drinks and nibbles at our house

---

### 07:00PM Travel to Reception
Hosted at XXX

---

### 10:00PM

---

### late
idk, usually gets loose at this point
